field.name: move_line_ids
field.readonly: state == 'cancel' or (state == 'done' and is_locked) or not product_id
field.context: {'tree_view_ref': 'stock.view_stock_move_line_operation_tree_custom', 'default_picking_id': picking_id, 'default_move_id': id, 'default_product_id': product_id, 'default_location_id': location_id, ' default_location_dest_id': location_dest_id, 'default_company_id': company_id}
